caption: A man with short grey hair and glasses, wearing a dark blue suit jacket, a light-colored dress shirt, and a purple tie, speaks while seated in an indoor setting with light-colored walls and glass partitions. He is captured from the chest up, and throughout the sequence, he continues speaking and gesturing slightly with his hands. At the bottom of the screen, a blue graphic banner provides event and speaker information. The text "MONGODB WORLD 2022", "#MDW22 | #theCUBE", and "theCUBE From the Javits Center, New York, NY" appear consistently across the frames. In the bottom-left frames, the text updates to identify the speaker as "DAVE VELLANTE Co-Founder & Co-CEO, SiliconANGLE Media, Inc. | @dvellante". A "Sponsored By MongoDB" logo is positioned on the right side of the banner. The scene remains static in composition as the man talks.
